instruction: What is the total number of units sold per product category through store channel in Q4 of 2001?
context: The supply chain planning team needs unit volume data by product category to forecast replenishment and negotiate vendor quantities.

aggregation_logic.Total Store Units Sold: SUM(ss_quantity) grouped by product category for year Q4 of 2001

chain_of_thought: Access store_sales for physical store transaction volume data.
Join to item dimension to obtain the product category attribute per transaction line.
Filter to calendar year Q4 of 2001 via date_dim join on ss_sold_date_sk.
Aggregate ss_quantity with SUM grouped by product category.
Sort by units sold descending to identify highest-volume segments.
sql:
SELECT
  i.i_category AS i_category,
  SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS total_units_sold
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
WHERE d.d_year = 2001 AND d.d_qoy = 4
GROUP BY i_category
ORDER BY total_units_sold DESC;
